senses.gloss: to turn away (from); to turn tail, to flee

examples.text: وَأَلْقِ عَصَاكَ فَلَمَّا رَءَاهَا تَهْتَزُّ كَأَنَّهَا جَانٌّ وَلَّى مُدْبِرًا وَلَمْ يُعَقِّبْ
examples.english: And [he was told]: “Throw down your staff.” But when he saw it writhing as if it were a snake, he turned in flight and did not return.

senses.gloss: to turn away (from); to pass by, to glide away, to elapse
to assign to, to appoint for, to commission with
